product_overview: Flowcontent is a multi-brand marketing studio CMS for planning, creating, reviewing, approving, and publishing social media content. It provides role-based workflows for admins and creators across content calendars, content plans, asset management, analytics, and notifications.
core_goals: Support session-based authentication with role-based access control
Enable multi-brand content operations with active brand scoping
Provide end-to-end content workflow from draft to posted status
Offer content planning, calendar scheduling, and bulk management tools
Centralize assets, templates, promos, trends, and notifications
Deliver dashboards, reports, and AI-assisted analysis for marketing performance

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allows users to log in, view their session profile, and log out with server-managed sessions and role-based access.
user_flows: POST /api/login with valid username/password -> Receive 200 with user, brands, and activeBrandId -> GET /api/me with session cookie -> Receive 200 with current user profile and brand context -> POST /api/logout with session cookie -> Receive 200 with ok true
POST /api/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 with error -> GET /api/me without a valid session -> Receive 401 with No session
POST /api/login repeatedly more than 5 times per minute -> Receive rate-limited login failure response from the server

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin-only user administration for listing, creating, deleting, and updating permissions for user accounts.
user_flows: POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> GET /api/users -> Receive 200 with users list -> POST /api/users with username, password, display_name, and role -> Receive 200 with ok true -> GET /api/users/:id/permissions -> Receive 200 with permissions
POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/users with a username that already exists -> Receive 400 with Username already exists

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> DELETE /api/users/:id for an existing account -> Receive 200 with ok true -> DELETE /api/users/:id for a missing account -> Receive 404 with User not found
POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> PUT /api/users/:id/permissions with permissions array -> Receive 200 with ok true

features.name: Brand Management
features.description: Supports multi-brand access, brand creation, updates, logo uploads, member management, and switching the active brand context.
user_flows: POST /api/login with a user assigned to multiple brands -> Receive 200 with brands and activeBrandId -> GET /api/brands -> Receive 200 with accessible brands -> POST /api/brand/switch with brand_id -> Receive 200 with ok true and updated activeBrandId

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/brands with name, description, and color -> Receive 200 with id and ok true -> PUT /api/brands/:id -> Receive 200 with ok true -> POST /api/brands/:id/logo with file upload -> Receive 200 with ok true and logo_url

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> GET /api/brands/:id/members -> Receive 200 with members list -> POST /api/brands/:id/members to add a user -> Receive 200 with ok true -> DELETE /api/brands/:id/members/:userId -> Receive 200 with ok true
POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> DELETE /api/brands/:id -> Receive 200 with ok true
POST /api/login as non-admin -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/brands -> Receive authorization failure due to admin-only restriction

features.name: Content Calendar
features.description: Provides content CRUD, filtering, status transitions, scheduling, version history, activity logs, and admin bulk operations for social content.
user_flows: POST /api/login as creator -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/contents with title, caption, platform, posting_date, and posting_time -> Receive 200 with id and ok true -> GET /api/contents/:id -> Receive 200 with content, logs, and versions -> PUT /api/contents/:id -> Receive 200 with ok true

POST /api/login as creator -> Receive 200 and session -> GET /api/contents with status and date filters -> Receive 200 with filtered contents -> PUT /api/contents/:id/status to move draft to pending_review -> Receive 200 with ok true -> GET /api/notifications -> Receive 200 with unread notification count

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> PUT /api/contents/:id/status to move pending_review to approved -> Receive 200 with ok true -> PUT /api/contents/:id/status to move approved to posted -> Receive 200 with ok true -> GET /api/contents/:id -> Receive 200 with updated status and version history

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> PUT /api/contents/:id/schedule -> Receive 200 with ok true -> PUT /api/contents/:id/date on a scheduled item -> Receive 403 with Cannot move scheduled/posted

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> DELETE /api/contents/bulk with ids array -> Receive 200 with success true and deleted count -> PATCH /api/contents/bulk/status with ids array and status -> Receive 200 with success true and updated count

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> DELETE /api/contents/:id for an existing content -> Receive 200 with ok true -> DELETE /api/contents/:id for a missing content -> Receive 404 with Not found

features.name: Content Plans
features.description: Enables plan listing, creation, updating, syncing with calendar content, CSV export/import, month grouping, and bulk admin actions.
user_flows: POST /api/login with a valid session -> GET /api/content-plans with page and limit -> Receive 200 with plans, total, page, and limit -> POST /api/content-plans with plan details -> Receive 200 with id -> PUT /api/content-plans/:id -> Receive 200 with success true
POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> GET /api/content-plans/months -> Receive 200 with distinct month groups -> GET /api/content-plans/export -> Receive 200 with CSV file

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/content-plans/import with CSV data -> Receive 200 with count and ids -> PATCH /api/content-plans/bulk/status with ids and status -> Receive 200 with success true and updated count

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> DELETE /api/content-plans/:id -> Receive 200 with success true -> DELETE /api/content-plans/bulk with ids array -> Receive 200 with success true and deleted count

features.name: Content Hub
features.description: Manages folder-based asset organization and media item uploads with searchable listing and admin deletion controls.
user_flows: POST /api/login with a valid session -> GET /api/folders -> Receive 200 with folders -> POST /api/folders with folder name -> Receive 200 with id and ok true -> GET /api/items -> Receive 200 with items, total, and page
POST /api/login with a valid session -> POST /api/items with file upload -> Receive 200 with id and ok true -> GET /api/items with search and pagination -> Receive 200 with matching items
POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> DELETE /api/folders/:id for a non-default folder -> Receive 200 with ok true -> DELETE /api/items/:id -> Receive 200 with ok true
POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> DELETE /api/folders/:id for a default or unauthorized folder -> Receive rejection due to non-default or admin-only restriction

features.name: Promo Management
features.description: Supports promo listing and admin creation/updating with allocation validation for branch or subsidy planning.
user_flows: POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> GET /api/promos -> Receive 200 with promos -> POST /api/promos with valid allocation totaling 100% -> Receive 200 with id and ok true -> PUT /api/promos/:id -> Receive 200 with ok true
POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/promos with allocation values that do not total 100% -> Receive 400 with Allocation must total 100%
POST /api/login as non-admin -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/promos -> Receive authorization failure due to admin-only restriction

features.name: Trending Topics & AI Generator
features.description: Lets admins generate trends via DeepSeek AI, manage manual trends, and create content drafts from selected topics.
user_flows: POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/trends/refresh -> Receive 200 with count -> GET /api/trends with platform and category filters -> Receive 200 with trends

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/trends with manual trend data -> Receive 200 with id and ok true -> PUT /api/trends/:id with relevance and notes -> Receive 200 with ok true -> POST /api/trends/batch-draft -> Receive 200 with ids and ok true
POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/trends/refresh when the AI key is missing or the external API fails -> Receive 500 with error

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Provides per-user notification listing, read-state updates, and deletion controls.
user_flows: POST /api/login with a valid session -> GET /api/notifications -> Receive 200 with notifications and unread count -> PUT /api/notifications/:id/read -> Receive 200 with ok true -> PUT /api/notifications/read-all -> Receive 200 with ok true
POST /api/login with a valid session -> DELETE /api/notifications/:id -> Receive 200 with ok true -> DELETE /api/notifications -> Receive 200 with ok true and deleted count
POST /api/login with a valid session -> DELETE /api/notifications/:id for a missing notification -> Receive failure response from the server

features.name: Dashboard & Analytics
features.description: Exposes content status counts, admin reports, and AI-assisted analysis for performance review.
user_flows: POST /api/login with a valid session -> GET /api/dashboard -> Receive 200 with drafts, pendingReview, approved, revisionRequested, scheduled, and posted counts

POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> GET /api/report with a date filter -> Receive 200 with totalPosts, posted, draft, pendingReview, scheduled, and contents -> POST /api/report/ai-analyze -> Receive 200 with analysis and rawData
POST /api/login as non-admin -> Receive 200 and session -> GET /api/report -> Receive authorization failure due to admin-only restriction
POST /api/login as admin -> Receive 200 and session -> POST /api/report/ai-analyze when external AI dependency fails -> Receive failure response due to DeepSeek API error

features.name: Canva Templates
features.description: Manages Canva template references, updates, deletions, and thumbnail uploads for creative workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/login with a valid session -> GET /api/canva-templates -> Receive 200 with templates -> POST /api/canva-templates with template data -> Receive 200 with id

POST /api/login with a valid session -> PUT /api/canva-templates/:id -> Receive 200 with success true -> POST /api/canva-templates/:id/thumbnail with file upload -> Receive 200 with ok true and thumbnail_url
POST /api/login with a valid session -> DELETE /api/canva-templates/:id -> Receive 200 with success true

features.name: File Upload
features.description: Provides a generic authenticated upload endpoint for media and other attached files.
user_flows: POST /api/login with a valid session -> POST /api/upload with a file attached -> Receive 200 with url and name
POST /api/login with a valid session -> POST /api/upload without a file -> Receive 400 with No file

features.name: Activity Logs & Search
features.description: Supports global search, recent activity retrieval, and team member listing across the active brand context.
user_flows: POST /api/login with a valid session -> GET /api/search -> Receive 200 with results -> GET /api/activities -> Receive 200 with logs -> GET /api/team -> Receive 200 with users
POST /api/login with a valid session -> GET /api/search with queries spanning plans, contents, items, and promos -> Receive 200 with matched results
POST /api/login with a valid session -> GET /api/team without brand membership context -> Receive restricted or filtered results based on active brand

features.name: Templates (Asset Generator)
features.description: Provides template listing and deletion for asset generation workflows, scoped by brand context.
user_flows: POST /api/login with a valid session -> GET /api/templates -> Receive 200 with templates -> DELETE /api/templates/:id -> Receive 200 with success true
POST /api/login with a valid session -> GET /api/templates with category filter -> Receive 200 with filtered templates
POST /api/login with a valid session -> DELETE /api/templates/:id for a missing template -> Receive failure response from the server

Create content plan and sync to calendar

Delete a plan and its synced content (admin only)

List content items with pagination and search

endpoints.description: Get content performance report with date filter (admin only)

response_schema.200: { totalPosts, posted, draft, pendingReview, scheduled, contents }

features.name: Templates (Asset Generator)

known_limitations.issue: DeepSeek API key may be missing from environment
known_limitations.impact: Trend generator and AI analysis features will fail

known_limitations.issue: No input validation on many POST/PUT endpoints
known_limitations.impact: Invalid or missing data accepted without proper error messages

known_limitations.issue: Rate limiting only applied to login endpoint
known_limitations.impact: Other API endpoints vulnerable to abuse

known_limitations.issue: SQLite database is file-based, no concurrency protection
known_limitations.impact: Potential data corruption under concurrent writes
Security risk if SESSION_SECRET env var not set
